title: McCormick (MKC) Hurt by Cost Inflation & Supply Chain Issues
text: McCormick (MKC) is grappling with pressures from higher inflation and broad-based supply chain-related hurdles. Yet, its saving efforts area tailwind.

title: 7 Long-Term Stocks to Buy Before the Bull Market Returns
text: The current market conditions aren't conducive for short-term investing. It's notoriously difficult to pick winning stocks with a limited time horizon, and it becomes doubly true in this extremely volatile market!
